mapper.sql: id, user_id, address_id, status, total_amount, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted
id, cart_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM carts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM carts WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT updated_at FROM carts WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carts (id, user_id, address_id, status, total_amount, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{addressId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cart_items WHERE cart_id = #{cartId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT FROM cart_items WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM cart_items WHERE cart_id = #{cartId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (id, cart_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{cartId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT updated_at FROM cart_items WHERE id = #{id}
